name: Keurig Dr Pepper
analysis: KDP's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 9% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at $31.6000. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $32.0000, stop $29.3733, target $39.8801 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
